narrative:
North Canton 3-A (precinct in Stark County) has 997 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
